hero.title: Mahanubhav International Charitable Foundation
hero.subtitle: A Sacred Space for Meditation, Yoga & Spiritual Growth

about.title: About MICF
about.subtitle1: MICF is founded with a deep commitment to serving the nation by fostering holistic development across key areas such as education, social welfare, religion, charity, and environmental protection. The organization works towards building a value-driven society guided by creation(सृजन), preservation(संवर्धन), protection(संरक्षण), and enlightenment(प्रबोधन ), ensuring meaningful progress at both individual and community levels.
about.subtitle2: Through its initiatives, MICF aims to empower communities, preserve cultural and spiritual heritage, and promote sustainable practices. By integrating service with purpose, the foundation strives to create a positive and lasting impact, ensuring a balanced approach toward social upliftment and environmental stewardship for future generations.

micf.title: About MICF
micf.content_p1: The divine message given by the founder of the sect, Sarvajna Shri Chakradhar Swami, for the welfare of humanity across the world, was carried forward by our ancestors as far as Kabul and Kandahar. This glorious history is well known to us all. Recreating this bright legacy is the need of the hour.
micf.content_p2: We observe that the present era is becoming increasingly fast-paced. The scope of scientific progress is steadily embracing the entire world. The diversity and abundance of resources continue to attract human beings. However, indulgence in these resources is pushing human life into a state of unrest—this is a harsh reality.
micf.content_p3: A society trapped in addiction is living a life of despair. Many happy families are becoming victims of such addictions. Violence, corruption, disorder, and terrorism are disturbing the peace of the world, the nation, society, and families.
micf.content_p4: This must stop somewhere. The powerful thought that can bring an end to this is the divine message of Sarvajna, which awakens moral values. It is our collective moral responsibility to take this message to the entire world.
micf.content_p5: Once again, the time has come for our spiritual leaders to share this message with confidence. Reviving the memories of our ancestors and following in their footsteps, we resolve today to take this welfare-oriented philosophy of Swami beyond Kabul and Kandahar, across the seven seas, to the entire world.
micf.content_p6: Through collective dialogue and deliberation among scholars, intellectuals, experienced individuals, aspiring contributors, entrepreneurs, and thinkers from all sections and traditions, a new thought platform is being established — “Mahanubhav International Charitable Foundation (Akhil Vishwa Mahanubhav Parishad)”

mission.title: Mission
mission.subtitle: To build a value-driven society through:

srijan.title: Srijan (Creation)
srijan.heading: Building Positive Foundations
srijan.desc: We focus on nurturing individuals with strong values, encouraging constructive thinking, and creating a foundation for responsible and ethical living. Srijan represents the beginning of transformation—where intentions shape actions.

sanvardhan.title: Sanvardhan (Awareness)
sanvardhan.heading: Creating Conscious Understanding
sanvardhan.desc: Awareness drives meaningful change. Through knowledge sharing, cultural education, and social understanding, we aim to build a society that is informed, mindful, and capable of making responsible decisions.

savrakshan.title: Savrakshan (Protection)
savrakshan.heading: Preserving What Matters
savrakshan.desc: We are committed to protecting our cultural heritage, environment, and ethical values. Savrakshan ensures that what is valuable today is sustained and respected for future generations.

prabodhan.title: Prabodhan (Enlightenment)
prabodhan.heading: Guiding Towards Wisdom
prabodhan.desc: True progress comes from inner awakening. Prabodhan focuses on spreading knowledge that inspires wisdom, clarity, and purposeful action, leading individuals towards a higher understanding of life.

mission.footer: MICF's mission is to empower individuals to think responsibly, act consciously, and contribute meaningfully to society.

vision.title: Vision
vision.subtitle: To create a globally connected, ethically strong, and socially responsible society where:

srijan.title: Srijan (Creation)
srijan.heading: Future Statement
srijan.desc: Where creation continuously nurtures growth and inspires positive transformation in individuals and communities.

sanvardhan.title: Sanvardhan (Awareness)
sanvardhan.heading: Future Statement
sanvardhan.desc: Where awareness empowers individuals to make conscious, informed, and responsible decisions in every aspect of life.

savrakshan.title: Savrakshan (Protection)
savrakshan.heading: Future Statement
savrakshan.desc: Where culture, values, and nature are preserved with care, ensuring continuity and balance for future generations.

prabodhan.title: Prabodhan (Enlightenment)
prabodhan.heading: Future Statement
prabodhan.desc: Where enlightenment leads humanity towards wisdom, inner clarity, and a deeper understanding of life.

vision.footer: MICF envisions becoming a global thought platform rooted in cultural wisdom and focused on future challenges.

inspiration.title: Our Inspiration
inspiration.subtitle: The spiritual guidance behind our mission
inspiration.content: Our foundation is inspired by the divine teachings of Panch Krishna and the selfless lineage of Gurus who have dedicated their lives to the service of others. Their vision continues to light our path today.

team.title: Our Dedicated Team
team.subtitle: The hands and hearts behind MICF

members.name: Acharya Rajhans Shevlikar Baba (Alias) Dharashivkar Baba

intro.title: Our Approach to Learning
intro.content: Education is the cornerstone of societal progress. We believe that true learning goes beyond textbooks—it involves building character, nurturing wisdom, and developing a sense of responsibility. MICF integrates modern knowledge with time-tested spiritual values to prepare the next generation. Our schools and Gurukuls focus on the all-round development of students, ensuring they are not only academically proficient but also ethically grounded and socially aware.

vision.title: A Vision for Enlightenment
vision.content: We envision an educated and aware society where every individual has access to high-quality education that fosters ethical leadership and social harmony.

list.title: Traditional Gurukuls
list.desc: Value-based residential education in a spiritual environment, focusing on ancient wisdom and modern character building.

list.title: Modern Schools
list.desc: Equipping students with cutting-edge knowledge, technology, and global perspectives in a supportive atmosphere.

list.title: Scholarship Fund
list.desc: Providing crucial financial aid for meritorious students from underprivileged backgrounds to pursue their dreams.

list.text: The combination of values and science has transformed my son's perspective. He is now more mindful of his choices.
list.author: Parent of a Student

list.text: MICF didn't just give me an education, it gave me a purpose. I am now serving my community as a teacher.
list.author: Former Scholarship Recipient

list.q: Are the schools open to everyone?
list.a: Yes, our programs serve students from all backgrounds based on merit and financial need, fostering an inclusive learning environment.

list.q: How can I apply for a scholarship?
list.a: Applications open annually in April through our regional centers. You can also contact us online for digital application forms.

intro.title: Addressing Societal Challenges
intro.content: A healthy society is one that cares for its most vulnerable members. Our social welfare initiatives are designed to address immediate needs while creating sustainable pathways for long-term empowerment.

vision.title: Vision for Harmony
vision.content: To build inclusive and supportive communities where every individual is treated with dignity and has the resources to thrive.

list.desc: Ensuring no one in our vicinity goes hungry through daily distribution.

list.q: How can I suggest a location for a health camp?

list.q: What kind of donations do you accept?
list.a: We accept monetary donations, non-perishable food, and new clothing.

intro.content: Planet Earth is a sacred gift that we must protect. Our environmental initiatives combine ecological science with spiritual reverence for nature to promote sustainable living.
